# Syntrex LLC

> Syntrex LLC is an AI automation agency headquartered in Windermere, Florida. We build custom AI chatbots, workflow automation systems, and business automation tools for companies of all sizes, anywhere in the world. Every system is built from scratch and delivered ready to run.

## Company Details

- Name: Syntrex LLC
- Type: AI automation and digital services agency
- Headquarters: 513 Main Street, Windermere, FL 34786, United States
- Email: henry@syntrexio.com
- Website: https://syntrexio.com
- Founded by: Henry Bello
- Service area: Worldwide

## Services (12 core service areas)

1. Website Design & Development — custom professional websites built from scratch, mobile ready, SEO optimized, designed to convert
2. Ecommerce & Online Stores — full online stores built to sell, product catalog, secure checkout, payments, inventory, and shipping, ready from day one
3. AI Chatbots — custom chatbots that qualify leads, answer questions, and book appointments 24/7
4. Workflow Automation — end-to-end automation of repetitive tasks: follow-ups, invoicing, data entry, lead routing, client onboarding
5. Lead Generation & Growth Systems — AI-powered pipelines for lead capture, scoring, follow-up, nurturing, conversion, and retention
6. AI Content & Social Media — blog posts, captions, video scripts, copy, AI-generated images, AI-built presentations, and scheduled posts in your brand voice
7. Custom AI Tools — internal tools for your team: proposal generators, quote builders, intake forms, report dashboards
8. System Integration — connect existing tools so they communicate automatically (calendar, email, forms, databases)
9. Brand & Digital Presence — full digital presence buildout: website, social profiles, email setup, content strategy, AI systems
10. AI Strategy & Consulting — operations audit, automation opportunity mapping, implementation roadmap
11. Reporting & Analytics Systems — custom AI dashboards and automated reports
12. AI Business Planning — AI tools that generate business plans, financial projections, and strategic documents

## Pricing

Every project gets a custom quote. No fixed tiers or packages. One-time project builds and monthly retainers are available. Every quote is free and agreed before work starts.

## Real Clients & Case Studies

- HALT! Fire (industrial fire suppression): built full sales automation system, saved 10+ hours of manual work per week
- Doughbrik's Wavers (CPG snack brand): built internal automation tools, 3x faster workflows
